stemHtml:
Considering the following NOTAM information, Charlie VOR CHA is NOT usable at a distance of…

>>> EDDF FRANKFURT MAIN <<< CHARLIE VOR CHA 115.50 NOT USEABLE BEYOND 35NM AND BELOW 5000FT AMSL.: NOTAM ED/A6376/15 >>> END OF BULLETIN <<<

options.a: more than 35 NM and at altitudes higher than 5000 ft.
options.b: less than 35 NM and at altitudes higher than 5000 ft.
options.c: more than 35 NM and at altitudes lower than 5000 ft.
options.d: less than 35 NM and at altitudes lower than 5000 ft.
